sqlMap.select: SELECT TBL_CONTAINER.containerid, TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid, TBL_CONTAINER.containerowndepid, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename2 FROM TBL_CONTAINER JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid AND TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id WHERE containerowndepid = #v_DEPTID# AND TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.containertypeid, TBL_CODELIST.code2 DocumentState, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename, TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypename2, TBL_CODELIST.name DOCUMENTSTATENAME, TBL_CODELIST.name2 DOCUMENTSTATENAME2, TBL_CODELIST.name3 DOCUMENTSTATENAME3, TBL_CODELIST.name4 DOCUMENTSTATENAME4 FROM TBL_CODELIST LEFT JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.documentstate = TBL_CODELIST.code2 AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id = TBL_CODELIST.tenant_id LEFT JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid AND TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id WHERE TBL_CODELIST.code1 = 'A02' AND TBL_CODELIST.isuse = '1' AND TBL_CODELIST.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE.documentstate

SELECT containerid, usedepid, (SELECT displayname FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AS T1 WHERE cn = A.usedepid) as containerTypeName, (SELECT displayname2 FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER AS T2 WHERE cn = A.usedepid) as containerTypeName2 FROM TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP A WHERE containerid = #v_CONTID# AND A.tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT taskcode, keepingperiod, tempflag, displayrecflag, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, keepingmethod, keepingplace, taskname, taskname2, subcategorycode FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE subcategorycode = #v_SUBCATECODE# AND delflag = '0' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY taskcode

SELECT TBL_TASKCODE.taskcode, TBL_TASKCODE.taskname, IFNULL(TBL_TASKCODE.taskname2, TBL_TASKCODE.TASKNAME) AS TASKNAME2, TBL_TASKCODE.keepingperiod, TBL_TASKCODE.creationdate CREATEDATE, TBL_TASKCODE.kpreason, TBL_TASKCODE.keepingmethod, TBL_TASKCODE.keepingplace, TBL_TASKCODE.displayrecflag, TBL_TASKCODE.displayrectrastime, TBL_TASKCODE.exdisplayfrequency, TBL_TASKCODE.specialcatalogflag, TBL_TASKCODE.sc1, TBL_TASKCODE.sc2, TBL_TASKCODE.sc3, TBL_TASKCODE.displayusage, TBL_TASKCODE.description, TBL_TASKCODE.tempflag, TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.processdate, TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.applydate FROM TBL_TASKCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO ON TBL_TASKCODE.taskcode = TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.taskcode AND TBL_TASKCODE.tenant_id = TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.tenant_id WHERE TBL_TASKCODE.taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND TBL_TASKCODE.tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND RTRIM(TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO.processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE#

SELECT taskcode, taskname, taskname2, keepingperiod, kpreason, keepingmethod, keepingplace, displayrecflag, displayrectrastime, exdisplayfrequency, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, displayusage, description, subcategorycode FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT taskname, taskname2 FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT processdeptcode, processdeptname, IFNULL(processdeptname2, PROCESSDEPTNAME) AS PROCESSDEPTNAME2, categorycode, cname, IFNULL(cname2,CNAME) AS CNAME2, mcategorycode, mcname, IFNULL(mcname2, MCNAME) AS MCNAME2, subcategorycode, scname, IFNULL(scname2, SCNAME) AS SCNAME2, taskcode, taskname, IFNULL(taskname2, TASKNAME) AS TASKNAME2, keepingperiod, keepingmethod, keepingplace, displayrecflag, displayrectrastime, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, tempflag FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND (RTRIM(processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE# OR taskcode LIKE 'ZZ%' OR taskcode = '99999999')
ORDER BY taskcode ASC
SELECT processdeptcode, processdeptname, processdeptname2 FROM TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND delflag = '0' AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY processdeptcode

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, regdate, deldate, reguserid, regusername FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY regdate DESC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, regdate, deldate, reguserid, regusername FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE deldate IS NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY regdate DESC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, regdate, deldate, reguserid, IFNULL(regusername2, REGUSERNAME) REGUSERNAME FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY regdate DESC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, regdate, deldate, reguserid, IFNULL(regusername2, REGUSERNAME) REGUSERNAME FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE deldate IS NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY regdate DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, STR_TO_DATE(regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') REGDATE, STR_TO_DATE(deldate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername, regusername2 FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO WHERE deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY regdate DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, STR_TO_DATE(regdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') REGDATE, STR_TO_DATE(deldate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') DELDATE, reguserid, regusername, regusername2 FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO WHERE deldate IS NULL AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY REGDATE DESC

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid, formid, orgdocid, doctype, docstate, functiontype, href, doctitle, docno, hasattachyn, hasopinionyn, STR_TO_DATE(startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS STARTDATE, STR_TO_DATE(enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ENDDATE, writerid, writername, IFNULL(writername2, WRITERNAME) AS WRITERNAME2, writerjobtitle, IFNULL(writerjobtitle2, WRITERJOBTITLE) AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, writerdeptid, writerdeptname, IFNULL(writerdeptname2,WRITERDEPTNAME) AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, ispublic, securitycode, storageperiod, keyword, formname, IFNULL(formname2,FORMNAME) AS FORMNAME2, itemcode, itemname, IFNULL(itemname2, ITEMNAME) AS ITEMNAME2, urgentapproval, tempattribute, status, specialrecordcode, publicitycode, limitrange, pagenum, cabinetid, taskcode, docnumcode, orgdocnumcode, seperateattachxml, summary, TBL_APRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO RIGHT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT docid, tenant_id FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprmembername = #v_APPROVUSER#
) aaa ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = aaa.docid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = aaa.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id WHERE (functiontype IS NOT NULL) AND (startdate IS NOT NULL)
AND docno LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DOCNUMBER#, '%')
AND doctitle LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DOCTITLE#, '%')
AND writername$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DRAFTER#, '%')
AND writerdeptname$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DEPTNAME#, '%')
AND formid = #v_FORMID#
AND docstate = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND STR_TO_DATE(startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= #v_STARTDATE1#
AND STR_TO_DATE(startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= #v_STARTDATE2#
AND STR_TO_DATE(enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= #v_ENDDATE1#
AND STR_TO_DATE(enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= #v_ENDDATE2#
AND #v_SUBQUERY#
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION#
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION#, startdate DESC
ORDER BY startdate DESC
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE#) aa
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION2#
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION2#, startdate
ORDER BY startdate
LIMIT #v_PAGESIZE2#) A ORDER BY startdate DESC
SELECT * FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE formcontid = #v_FORMCONTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT formcontid, formid, formname, formname2, formdoctype, formdescription, formfilelocation, formconnflag FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE formid = #v_PFORMID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT deptid FROM TBL_FORMRECV WHERE formid = #v_FORMID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY deptsn

select.isEqual: SELECT categorycode, name, IFNULL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '1' CATEGORYTYPE, 'ROOT' FROM TBL_TASKCATEGORY WHERE oldflag IS NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT mcategorycode, name, IFNULL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '2' CATEGORYTYPE, categorycode FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE categorycode = #v_PARENTID# AND oldflag IS NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT subcategorycode, name, IFNULL(name2, NAME) NAME2, description, '3' CATEGORYTYPE, mcategorycode FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY WHERE mcategorycode = #v_PARENTID# AND oldflag IS NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE mainid = #v_MAINID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY subid

SELECT DISTINCT TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainid, TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainname FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN JOIN TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB ON TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainid = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.mainid AND TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.tenant_id = TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB.tenant_id WHERE TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN.mainid

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT * FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY mainid

isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT applydate, taskcode, taskname, changefactor, beforevalue, aftervalue FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY sn DESC
isEqual.isEqual: SELECT applydate, taskcode, taskname, taskname2, changefactor, beforevalue, aftervalue FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY sn DESC LIMIT 100

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT applydate, taskcode, IFNULL(taskname2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME, IFNULL(changefactor2, CHANGEFACTOR) CHANGEFACTOR, beforevalue, aftervalue2 AFTERVALUE FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY sn DESC
isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT applydate, taskcode, IFNULL(taskname2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME, IFNULL(changefactor2, CHANGEFACTOR) CHANGEFACTOR, beforevalue, aftervalue2 AFTERVALUE FROM TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# ORDER BY sn DESC LIMIT 100

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT sentdeptid, sentdeptname, IFNULL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= DATE_FORMAT(#v_FROM#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND processdate < DATE_FORMAT(#v_TO#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname ORDER BY sentdeptname

SELECT receiveddeptid , receiveddeptname , IFNULL(COUNT(receiveddeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= DATE_FORMAT(#v_FROM#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND processdate < DATE_FORMAT(#v_TO#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname ORDER BY receiveddeptname

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sentdeptid , sentdeptname, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname, IFNULL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= DATE_FORMAT(#v_FROM#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND processdate < DATE_FORMAT(#v_TO#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname ORDER BY sentdeptname, receiveddeptname

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT sentdeptid, sentdeptname2 SENTDEPTNAME, IFNULL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND receivesn = '2' AND processdate >= DATE_FORMAT(#v_FROM#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND processdate < DATE_FORMAT(#v_TO#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname2 ORDER BY sentdeptname2

SELECT receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, COUNT(receiveddeptid) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= DATE_FORMAT(#v_FROM#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND processdate < DATE_FORMAT(#v_TO#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 ORDER BY receiveddeptname2

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT sentdeptid, sentdeptname2 SENTDEPTNAME, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, IFNULL(COUNT(sentdeptid), 0) APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE docstate = '011' AND processdate >= DATE_FORMAT(#v_FROM#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND processdate < DATE_FORMAT(#v_TO#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY sentdeptid, sentdeptname2, receiveddeptid, receiveddeptname2 ORDER BY sentdeptname2, receiveddeptname2

sqlMap.select: SELECT aprmemberdeptid, aprmemberid, aprmembername$v_STRLANG$, aprmemberdeptname$v_STRLANG$, aprmemberjobtitle$v_STRLANG$, IFNULL(COUNT(aprmemberid), 0) AS APRCOUNT FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE aprtype = #v_APRTYPE# AND processdate >= DATE_FORMAT(#v_FROM#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND processdate < DATE_FORMAT(#v_TO#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AND tenant_id = #tenantID# GROUP BY aprmemberdeptid, aprmemberid, aprmembername$v_STRLANG$, aprmemberdeptname$v_STRLANG$, aprmemberjobtitle$v_STRLANG$ ORDER BY aprmemberdeptname$v_STRLANG$, aprmembername$v_STRLANG$

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(TBL_CONTAINER.containerid), 0) FROM TBL_CONTAINER JOIN TBL_CONTAINERTYPE ON TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.containertypeid AND TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = TBL_CONTAINERTYPE.tenant_id WHERE TBL_CONTAINER.containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID# AND TBL_CONTAINER.tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE WHERE containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERTYPE WHERE containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(formid) FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_FORMINFO (formcontid, formid, formname, formname2, formdoctype, formdescription, formfilelocation, formconnflag, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_PFORMCONTAINERID#, #v_PID#, #v_PFORMNAME#, #v_PFORMNAME2#, #v_PFORMKIND#, #v_PFORMDESCRIPT#, #v_PURL#, #v_PFORMCONNFLAG#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FORMINFO SET formcontid = #v_PFORMCONTAINERID#, formname = #v_PFORMNAME#, formname2 = #v_PFORMNAME2#, formdoctype = #v_PFORMKIND#, formdescription = #v_PFORMDESCRIPT#, formfilelocation = #v_PURL#, formconnflag = #v_PFORMCONNFLAG# WHERE formid = #v_PFORMID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_FORMRECV WHERE formid = #v_PFORMID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_FORMRECV (formid, deptid, deptsn, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_PFORMID#, #deptID#, #deptSN#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT containerid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE containertypeid = #v_CONTTYPEID# AND containerowndepid = (SELECT containerowndepid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE containerID = #v_DEPTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#) AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(categorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKCATEGORY WHERE categorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(mcategorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE mcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(subcategorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY WHERE subcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(mcategorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY WHERE categorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND oldflag IS NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(subcategorycode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY WHERE mcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND oldflag IS NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE subcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND delflag = '0' AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_CABINETCLASS WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND RTRIM(processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(taskcode), 0) FROM TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND RTRIM(processdeptcode) = #v_DEPTCODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid), 0) FROM TBL_APRDOCINFO RIGHT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT docid, tenant_id FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE TBL_APRLINEINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprmembername = #v_APPROVUSER#
) aaa ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = aaa.docid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = aaa.tenant_id INNER JOIN TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBL_APRDOCINFO.docid = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.docid AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = TBL_EXPAPRDOCINFO.tenant_id WHERE (functiontype IS NOT NULL) AND (startdate IS NOT NULL) AND TBL_APRDOCINFO.tenant_id = #tenantID#
AND docno LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DOCNUMBER#, '%')
AND doctitle LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DOCTITLE#, '%')
AND writername$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DRAFTER#, '%')
AND writerdeptname$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #v_DEPTNAME#, '%')
AND formid = #v_FORMID#
AND docstate = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND STR_TO_DATE(startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= #v_STARTDATE1#
AND STR_TO_DATE(startdate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= #v_STARTDATE2#
AND STR_TO_DATE(enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') >= #v_ENDDATE1#
AND STR_TO_DATE(enddate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') <= #v_ENDDATE2#
AND #v_SUBQUERY#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONTAINERTYPE (containertypeid, containertypename, containertypename2, tenant_id) VALUES ((SELECT * FROM (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(CAST(TRIM(containertypeid) as INT)), 1000) + 10 FROM TBL_CONTAINERTYPE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#) AS T1), #v_CONTTYPENAME#, #v_CONTTYPENAME2#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP WHERE containerid = #v_CONTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE containerid = #v_CONTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB (mainid, subid, deptid, deptname, deptname2, companyid, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_MAINID#, (SELECT MAX(subid) + 1 FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB AS T1), #v_DEPTID#, #v_DEPTNAME#, #v_DEPTNAME2#, #v_COMPANYID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE subid = #v_SUBID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN SET mainname = #v_MAINNAME# WHERE mainid = #v_MAINID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE mainid = #v_MAINID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCATEGORY (categorycode, name, name2, description, oldflag, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CATECODE#, #v_NAME#, #v_NAME2#, #v_DESC#, NULL, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY (mcategorycode, name, name2, description, categorycode, oldflag, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CATECODE#, #v_NAME#, #v_NAME2#, #v_DESC#, #v_CODE#, NULL, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY (subcategorycode, name, name2, description, mcategorycode, oldflag, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_CATECODE#, #v_NAME#, #v_NAME2#, #v_DESC#, #v_CODE#, NULL, #tenantID#)

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_TASKCATEGORY SET name = #v_NAME#, name2 = #v_NAME2#, description = #v_DESC# WHERE categorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY SET name = #v_NAME#, name2 = #v_NAME2#, description = #v_DESC#, categorycode = #v_CODE# WHERE mcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY SET name = #v_NAME#, name2 = #v_NAME2#, description = #v_DESC#, mcategorycode = #v_CODE# WHERE subcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TASKCATEGORY SET oldflag = 'Y' WHERE categorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TASKMIDDLECATEGORY SET oldflag = 'Y' WHERE mcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TASKSUBCATEGORY SET oldflag = 'Y' WHERE subcategorycode = #v_CATECODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_SEALINFO SET deldate = DATE_FORMAT(#v_pNow#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE deldate IS NULL AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEALINFO SET deldate = DATE_FORMAT(#v_pNow#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE sealnum = #v_SEALNUM# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEALDEPTINFO SET deldate = DATE_FORMAT(#v_pNow#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE deldate IS NULL AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_SEALDEPTINFO SET deldate = DATE_FORMAT(#v_pNow#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE sealnum = #v_SEALNUM# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(sealnum), 0) FROM TBL_SEALINFO WHERE sealnum = #v_SEALNUM# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SEALINFO (sealnum, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, regdate, deldate, reguserid, regusername, regusername2, tenant_id) VALUES ((SELECT IFNULL(MAX(sealnum), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_SEALINFO AS T1 WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#), #v_SEALNAME#, #v_SEALPATH#, #v_SEALWIDTH#, #v_SEALHEIGHT#, DATE_FORMAT(#v_pNow#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), NULL, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_REGUSERNAME#, #v_REGUSERNAME2#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SEALINFO SET sealname = #v_SEALNAME#, sealpath = #v_SEALPATH#, sealwidth = #v_SEALWIDTH#, sealheight = #v_SEALHEIGHT#, reguserid = #v_REGUSERID#, regusername = #v_REGUSERNAME#, regusername2 = #v_REGUSERNAME2# WHERE sealnum = #v_SEALNUM# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(sealnum), 0) FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO WHERE sealnum = #v_SEALNUM# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SEALDEPTINFO (sealnum, deptid, sealname, sealpath, sealwidth, sealheight, regdate, deldate, reguserid, regusername, regusername2, tenant_id) VALUES ((SELECT IFNULL(MAX(sealnum) , 0) + 1 FROM TBL_SEALDEPTINFO AS T1 WHERE deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#), #v_DEPTID#, #v_SEALNAME#, #v_SEALPATH#, #v_SEALWIDTH#, #v_SEALHEIGHT#, DATE_FORMAT(#v_pNow#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), NULL, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_REGUSERNAME#, #v_REGUSERNAME2#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SEALDEPTINFO SET sealname = #v_SEALNAME#, sealpath = #v_SEALPATH#, sealwidth = #v_SEALWIDTH#, sealheight = #v_SEALHEIGHT#, reguserid = #v_REGUSERID#, regusername = #v_REGUSERNAME#, regusername2 = #v_REGUSERNAME2# WHERE sealnum = #v_SEALNUM# AND deptid = #v_DEPTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_FORMINFO SET formorder = #order# WHERE formid = #v_pFormID# AND formcontid = #v_pFormContID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE formcontid = #v_FORMCONTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE formcontid = #v_FORMCONTID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE formid = #v_FORMID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMUSERINFO WHERE formid = #v_FORMID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO SET containerid = #v_CONTID# WHERE docid = #v_DOCID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(formcontid) FROM TBL_FORMCONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT containertypeid, containertypename, containertypename2 FROM TBL_CONTAINERTYPE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(containerid), '0000000000') as contid FROM TBL_CONTAINER WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CONTAINERTODOCSTATE (containertypeid, documentstate, tenant_id) VALUES (#data1#, #data2#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_CONTAINER (containerid, containertypeid, containerowndepid, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #contType#, #deptID#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP (containerid, usedepid, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #deptID#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCODEHISTORY (applydate, taskcode, taskname, taskname2, changefactor, changefactor2, beforevalue, aftervalue, aftervalue2, tenant_id) VALUES (DATE_FORMAT(#v_APPLYDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #v_TASKCODE#, #v_TASKNAME#, #v_TASKNAME2#, #v_CHANGEFACTOR#, #v_CHANGEFACTOR2#, #v_BEFOREVALUE#, #v_AFTERVALUE#, #v_AFTERVALUE2#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCODE (taskcode, taskname, taskname2, keepingperiod, creationdate, kpreason, keepingmethod, keepingplace, displayrecflag, displayrectrastime, exdisplayfrequency, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, displayusage, description, subcategorycode, tenant_id) VALUES (#v_TASKCODE#, #v_TASKNAME#, #v_TASKNAME2#, #v_KEEPINGPERIOD#, DATE_FORMAT(#v_CREATIONDATE#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #v_KPREASON#, #v_KEEPINGMETHOD#, #v_KEEPINGPLACE#, #v_DISPLAYRECFLAG#, #v_DISPLAYRECTRASTIME#, #v_EXDISPLAYFREQUENCY#, #v_SPECIALCATALOGFLAG#, #v_SC1#, #v_SC2#, #v_SC3#, #v_DISPLAYUSAGE#, #v_DESCRIPTION#, #v_SUBCATEGORYCODE#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO( createdate, description, processdeptname, processdeptname2, tasktransferflag, tdeptcode, processdeptcode, processdate, applydate, taskcode, delflag, deletedate, organcode, tenant_id ) SELECT creationdate, NULL, #deptName#, #deptName2#, '0', NULL, #deptCode#, #v_pNow1#, #v_pNow2#, taskcode, '0', NULL, NULL, #tenantID# FROM TBL_TASKCODE WHERE taskcode = #taskCode# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

INSERT INTO TBL_FORMCONTAINER (formcontid, formcontname, formcontname2, formcontowndepid, formcontparents, formcontdescription, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #contName#, #contName2#, #contDept#, #contParent#, #contDescript#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP (formcontid, formcontuserdepid, tenant_id) VALUES (#contID#, #deptID#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CONTAINER SET containertypeid = #contType#, containerowndepid = #deptID# WHERE containerid = #contID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_TASKCODE SET taskname = #v_TASKNAME#, taskname2 = #v_TASKNAME2#, keepingperiod = #v_KEEPINGPERIOD#, kpreason = #v_KPREASON#, keepingmethod = #v_KEEPINGMETHOD#, keepingplace = #v_KEEPINGPLACE#, displayrecflag = #v_DISPLAYRECFLAG#, displayrectrastime = #v_DISPLAYRECTRASTIME#, exdisplayfrequency = #v_EXDISPLAYFREQUENCY#, specialcatalogflag = #v_SPECIALCATALOGFLAG#, sc1 = #v_SC1#, sc2 = #v_SC2#, sc3 = #v_SC3#, displayusage = #v_DISPLAYUSAGE#, description = #v_DESCRIPTION#, subcategorycode = #v_SUBCATEGORYCODE# WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TASKCODE SET delflag = '1' WHERE taskcode = #taskCode# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO SET delflag = '1', deletedate = DATE_FORMAT(#now#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE taskcode = #taskCode# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO SET processDate = #v_pNow1#, processDeptName = #deptName#, processDeptName2 = #deptName2#, delFlag = '0', deletedate = NULL WHERE taskcode = #taskCode# AND RTRIM(processdeptcode) = #deptCode# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_TASK_DEPTINFO SET processdate = #v_pNow1#, delflag = '1', deletedate = DATE_FORMAT(#v_pNow2#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE taskcode = #taskCode# AND RTRIM(processdeptcode) = #deptCode# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#

UPDATE TBL_FORMCONTAINER SET formcontname = #contName#, formcontname2 = #contName2#, formcontowndepid = #contDept#, formcontparents = #contParent#, formcontdescription = #contDescript# WHERE formcontid = #contID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONTAINERUSEDEP WHERE containerID = #contID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_FORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE formcontid = #contID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT sn, code, id, name FROM TBL_FORMPROPERTY WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND uppercode = #upperCode#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_FORMINFO SET formcontid = #selContID#, formorder = (SELECT * FROM (SELECT IFNULL(MAX(formorder), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_FORMINFO WHERE formcontid = #selContID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID# ) AS T1 ) WHERE formcontid = #contID# AND formid = #formID# AND tenant_id = #tenantID#
